cases.title: TS-21d: Empty DB bootstrap — GET needsSetup true then POST first-admin creates TrainingOfficeAdmin
preconditions: PostgreSQL database with User.count = 0 (SEED_ENABLED=false or truncated users table)
API running at /api/v1 with no session cookie
steps: GET /api/v1/setup/status without authentication
Assert HTTP 200 and body { needsSetup: true }
POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin with valid institutionalId, displayName, email, and password (≥8 chars per VAL-03)
Assert HTTP 201 Created and Set-Cookie wecheck_session present
GET /api/v1/auth/me using session cookie and assert role TrainingOfficeAdmin
GET /api/v1/setup/status and assert needsSetup false
cases.expected: Testing-plan TS-21d and FR-17 satisfied: empty deployment reports needsSetup true; first-admin POST creates TrainingOfficeAdmin with authenticated session; needsSetup flips to false

cases.title: SetupService.getStatus reflects User.count zero as needsSetup true against real Postgres
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database with users table empty
identity-auth SetupService wired to UserRepository per module breakdown
steps: Assert users table row count === 0
Invoke SetupService.getStatus()
Assert returned needsSetup === true
Insert one TrainingOfficeAdmin via UserRepository in test transaction
Invoke SetupService.getStatus() again
Assert returned needsSetup === false
cases.expected: Tag-specific integration hint satisfied: setup status module boundary maps User.count = 0 to needsSetup true per FR-17 and BR-13

cases.title: SetupService.createFirstAdmin persists admin user, auth session, and enforces one-time bootstrap
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with User.count = 0
SetupService.createFirstAdmin available with password hashing per UserService
steps: Invoke createFirstAdmin with valid DTO (institutionalId, displayName, email, password)
Query users table and assert exactly one row with role TrainingOfficeAdmin
Query auth_sessions table and assert session row linked to new userId
Invoke createFirstAdmin again with different valid DTO
Assert SetupAlreadyComplete domain error and users table count remains 1
cases.expected: Module-integration: bootstrap creates exactly one admin user and session; repeat attempt rejected at service layer per BR-13

cases.title: Deployment gate transitions needsSetup true to false after first admin commit
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with beforeState: User.count = 0 and needsSetup true
SetupService.createFirstAdmin transactional path available
steps: Record beforeState: setup status needsSetup true; users count 0
Execute createFirstAdmin transaction to completion
Record afterState: users count 1; role TrainingOfficeAdmin
Assert needsSetup false on subsequent status check
Attempt createFirstAdmin and assert SetupAlreadyComplete without rollback
cases.expected: State transition: deployment moves from bootstrap-required (needsSetup true) to login-available (needsSetup false) after exactly one admin user committed per FR-17

cases.title: GET /api/v1/setup/status returns 200 JSON with needsSetup boolean per API design §2.0
preconditions: Empty database fixture (needsSetup true) and post-bootstrap fixture (needsSetup false) available
steps: Send GET /api/v1/setup/status without authentication on empty DB
Assert HTTP 200 OK and Content-Type application/json
Assert response body { needsSetup: true }
Switch to post-bootstrap fixture with one admin user
Send GET /api/v1/setup/status
Assert HTTP 200 and body { needsSetup: false }
cases.expected: Tag-specific integration hint satisfied: HTTP contract for setup status endpoint returns 200 with needsSetup flag reflecting User.count

cases.title: POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin returns 201 with session cookie on empty DB
preconditions: Empty database; no session cookie
Valid setup payload per validation rules §3.1a
steps: Send POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin with JSON body { institutionalId, displayName, email, password }
Assert HTTP 201 Created
Assert Set-Cookie header contains wecheck_session HttpOnly cookie (same as login per API design §2.0)
Assert response body includes user DTO with role TrainingOfficeAdmin and no password fields
GET /api/v1/auth/me with session cookie and assert authenticated admin identity
cases.expected: HTTP 201 contract for successful bootstrap; session cookie issued identically to POST /auth/login success path per FR-17 outputs

cases.title: POST /setup/first-admin returns 403 SetupAlreadyComplete when bootstrap already complete (not 201 or 422)
preconditions: Database with User.count >= 1; needsSetup false
No valid bootstrap window open
steps: GET /api/v1/setup/status and assert needsSetup false
POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin with valid new-admin payload without session
Assert HTTP 403 Forbidden (not 201, not 422)
Assert response errorCode SetupAlreadyComplete per API design §2.0 and error-handling §2.4
Assert Vietnamese user-facing message present and no stack trace
Query users table and assert User.count unchanged
cases.expected: /setup first-admin endpoint denied after bootstrap per roles-permissions §2.3b; repeat POST rejected with SetupAlreadyComplete per FR-17 and AC-17c

cases.title: AC-17d: Sequential duplicate email or institutional ID on setup returns 422 ValidationFailed; no user created
preconditions: Empty database (User.count = 0); needsSetup true
Valid first setup payload prepared; duplicate-field variants for email and institutionalId
steps: POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin with duplicate email and otherwise valid fields
Assert HTTP 422 ValidationFailed with duplicate email field detail and inline Vietnamese message per forms-validation §4.1a
Assert users table count remains 0 and GET /api/v1/setup/status returns needsSetup true
POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin with duplicate institutionalId and unique email
Assert HTTP 422 ValidationFailed with duplicate institutionalId field detail
Assert users table count remains 0
cases.expected: AC-17d boundary: duplicate email or institutional ID on bootstrap rejected with field validation; no user created per FR-17 inputs validation

cases.title: POST /setup/first-admin with password below minimum strength returns 422 ValidationFailed
preconditions: Empty database; needsSetup true
Password shorter than 8 characters per VAL-03 and forms-validation §4.1a
steps: POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin with valid institutionalId, displayName, email, and password 'short'
Assert HTTP 422 ValidationFailed
Assert response details include password field validation error
Assert users table count remains 0 and needsSetup remains true
cases.expected: Bootstrap password boundary enforced: weak password rejected; deployment remains in needsSetup true state per FR-17 auth rules

cases.title: Parallel POST /setup/first-admin on empty DB creates at most one TrainingOfficeAdmin
preconditions: Empty PostgreSQL database
Two or more concurrent valid setup payloads with unique emails and institutionalIds
SetupService uses pg_advisory_xact_lock or equivalent serialization per module-identity-bootstrap
steps: Fire parallel POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin requests against empty DB
Collect HTTP status codes from all responses
Assert exactly one response is HTTP 201 Created with session cookie
Assert all other responses are HTTP 403 SetupAlreadyComplete or conflict rejection
Query users table and assert User.count === 1 with role TrainingOfficeAdmin
cases.expected: BR-13 exactly-one bootstrap invariant holds under concurrent requests; no duplicate admin rows per FR-17 one-time rule

cases.title: Fresh deploy: all routes except /setup redirect to setup form; AuthLayout hides login link
preconditions: Web app running with empty database (needsSetup true)
No session cookie in browser
steps: Navigate browser to / (root route)
Assert URL redirects to /setup per FR-17 route guard
Navigate to /login and assert redirect to /setup (login link hidden in AuthLayout per page-list §2.0 and forms-validation §4.1a)
Navigate to /admin/users and assert redirect to /setup
Assert SetupAdminForm visible with Vietnamese fields (Mã cán bộ, Họ và tên, Email, Mật khẩu)
cases.expected: FR-17 behavior: needsSetup true redirects all routes except /setup to /setup; login unavailable until bootstrap completes per AC-17a

cases.title: Successful setup form submission establishes session and redirects to /admin hub
preconditions: Web app with empty database (needsSetup true)
Valid setup credentials prepared per forms-validation §4.1a
steps: Navigate browser to /setup
Fill institutionalId, displayName, email, and password fields with valid values
Submit SetupAdminForm (primary button Tạo tài khoản)
Assert POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin succeeds (network tab or outcome UI)
Assert browser navigates to /admin hub per FR-17 outputs and page-list §2.0
Assert AdminLayout chrome visible (e.g. Trang chủ sidebar item or Quản trị label)
cases.expected: FR-17 outputs: first admin created, authenticated session established, redirect to /admin hub per AC-17b

cases.title: AC-17c browser: /setup unavailable after bootstrap — redirects to login or shows forbidden
preconditions: Bootstrap already complete (needsSetup false)
Browser has no active session
steps: Navigate browser directly to /setup
Assert redirect to /login OR forbidden/unavailable state without SetupAdminForm
If page remains on /setup without redirect, assert visible link to /login per FR-18 auth routes and AC-17c
Assert no institutional ID / password setup fields rendered
Navigate browser to / from unauthenticated state when needsSetup false
Assert URL stays at / (not /setup) and SetupAdminForm is not shown
Assert RouteDiscoveryPanel visible with quick links labeled Đăng nhập, Điểm danh, Buổi học, Quản trị per AC-18f
cases.expected: AC-17c UI outcome: /setup not available after bootstrap; visitor directed to login flow; root no longer gates to /setup and shows route discovery per AC-18f

cases.title: AC-17d: Concurrent setup POST with identical email yields single admin and validation or bootstrap-closed error
preconditions: Empty database (User.count = 0); needsSetup true
Two payloads sharing email dup@example.edu.vn but different institutionalId values (ADMIN001, ADMIN002)
steps: Fire two parallel POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin requests with identical email and distinct institutionalIds on empty DB
Assert exactly one HTTP 201 Created response with wecheck_session cookie
Assert the other response is HTTP 422 ValidationFailed with duplicate email field detail OR HTTP 403 SetupAlreadyComplete if first transaction committed
Query users table and assert User.count === 1
GET /api/v1/setup/status and assert needsSetup false
cases.expected: AC-17d edge: duplicate email on concurrent bootstrap rejected; at most one TrainingOfficeAdmin persisted per BR-13

cases.title: AC-17d: Concurrent setup POST with identical institutionalId yields single admin and validation or bootstrap-closed error
preconditions: Empty database (User.count = 0); needsSetup true
Two payloads sharing institutionalId ADMIN001 but different email values (admin1@example.edu.vn, admin2@example.edu.vn)
steps: Fire two parallel POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin requests with identical institutionalId and distinct emails on empty DB
Assert exactly one HTTP 201 Created response with wecheck_session cookie
Assert the other response is HTTP 422 ValidationFailed with duplicate institutionalId field detail OR HTTP 403 SetupAlreadyComplete if first transaction committed
Query users table and assert User.count === 1
GET /api/v1/setup/status and assert needsSetup false
cases.expected: AC-17d boundary: duplicate institutional ID on concurrent bootstrap rejected; at most one TrainingOfficeAdmin persisted per BR-13

cases.title: AC-17d browser: SetupAdminForm shows inline Vietnamese errors when duplicate email submission rejected
preconditions: Web app with empty database (needsSetup true)
Two browser contexts (tabs) with no session cookie
steps: Open /setup in both browser contexts
Fill both SetupAdminForms with identical email dup@example.edu.vn and distinct institutionalIds (ADMIN001, ADMIN002) plus valid displayName and password
Submit Tạo tài khoản in both contexts nearly simultaneously
Assert exactly one context navigates to /admin hub with session established
Assert the other context remains on /setup with inline Vietnamese validation error on email field OR bootstrap-closed error message (not a successful redirect)
Assert GET /api/v1/setup/status returns needsSetup false and users table User.count === 1
cases.expected: AC-17d UI outcome: duplicate email on setup form surfaces inline Vietnamese field error per forms-validation-ux §4.1a; at most one TrainingOfficeAdmin created
